case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. RAFAEL F BARRIENTOS et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-23-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-21-2011 CONTINUED TO JAN-23-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE NOV-21-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIENTOS, RAFAEL F AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-03-2011
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE OF PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-21-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE RAFAEL F BARRIENTOS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC
